zh.lifeSummary: 當Lydia Bushnell於1661年出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州劍橋大學默里 倫敦賽布盧可時，她的父親Lieutenant William Bushnell Sr of Horsham50歲，母親Rebecca Chapman44歲。她於1686年7月14日與Caleb Seward在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州劍橋大學默里 哈文吉爾福特結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州哈特福德達勒姆，埋葬在美國康乃狄克州米德萊可達勒姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lydia Bushnell于1661年出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州劍橋大學默里 倫敦賽布盧可时，她的父亲Lieutenant William Bushnell Sr of Horsham50岁，母亲Rebecca Chapman44岁。她于1686年7月14日与Caleb Seward在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州劍橋大學默里 哈文吉爾福特结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州哈特福德達勒姆，埋葬在美国康涅狄格州米德萊可達勒姆。

nameMeanings.name: Bushnell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Bushnells Green in Bucklebury (Berkshire), early recorded as Bushenell or Busshendhill.
History: Francis Bushnell came to New Haven, CT, in 1639, and was a founder of Guilford, CT.

nameMeanings.name: Lydia
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Greek origin, meaning ‘woman from Lydia’, an area of Asia Minor. The name is borne in the Bible by a woman of Thyatira who was converted by St Paul and who entertained him in her house (Acts 16:14–15, 40). It has enjoyed steady popularity in the English-speaking world since the 17th century.

en.lifeSummary: When Lydia Bushnell was born in 1661, in Saybrook, New London, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, her father, Lieutenant William Bushnell Sr of Horsham, was 50 and her mother, Rebecca Chapman, was 44. She married Caleb Seward on 14 July 1686, in Guilford, New Haven, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 1 daughter. She died in Durham, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, and was buried in Durham, Middlesex, Connecticut, United States.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lydia Bushnell est née en 1661, à Saybrook, New London, Connecticut Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, son père, Lieutenant William Bushnell Sr of Horsham, avait 50 ans et sa mère, Rebecca Chapman, avait 44 ans. Elle a épousé Caleb Seward le 14 juillet 1686, à Guilford, New Haven, Connecticut Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée à Durham, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, et a été enterrée à Durham, Middlesex, Connecticut, États-Unis.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lydia Bushnell 1661 in Saybrook, New London, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Lieutenant William Bushnell Sr of Horsham 50 und ihre Mutter Rebecca Chapman 44. Sie hat am 14. Juli 1686 in Guilford, New Haven, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America Caleb Seward geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb in Durham, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America und wurde in Durham, Middlesex, Connecticut, Vereinigte Staaten begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lydia Bushnell è nata il nel 1661 nel Saybrook, New London, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, sua padre, Lieutenant William Bushnell Sr of Horsham, aveva 50 anni e sua madre, Rebecca Chapman, aveva 44 anni. Lei sposato Caleb Seward il 14 luglio 1686, nel Guilford, New Haven, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel Durham, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, e fu sepolta a Durham, Middlesex, Connecticut, Stati Uniti d'America.

ja.lifeSummary: Lydia Bushnellが1661年にイギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州ニュー ロンドンサイブルークで生まれた時，父Lieutenant William Bushnell Sr of Horshamは50歳，母Rebecca Chapmanは44歳であった。1686年7月14日にイギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州ニュー ヘイベングイルフォードでCaleb Sewardと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女はイギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州ハートフォードダルハムで死去し，アメリカ合衆国コネチカット州ミッドレセックスダルハムにて埋葬された。

ko.Saybrook, Connecticut, British Colonial: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 뉴 런던 지브룩

ko.lifeSummary: Lydia Bushnell(이)가 1661년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 뉴 런던 지브룩에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Lieutenant William Bushnell Sr of Horsham(은)는 50세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Rebecca Chapman(은)는 44세였다. 그녀는 1686년 7월 14일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 뉴 하븐 길퍼드에서 Caleb Seward(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 하트퍼드 뒤람에서 사망했으며 미국 코네티컷 주 미들레세스 뒤람에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lydia Bushnell nasceu em 1661, em Saybrook, New London, Conecticute, British Colonial America, seu pai, Lieutenant William Bushnell Sr of Horsham, tinha 50 anos e sua mãe, Rebecca Chapman, tinha 44 anos. Ela casou-se com Caleb Seward em 14 de julho de 1686, em Guilford, New Haven, Conecticute, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em Durham, Hartford, Conecticute, British Colonial America, e foi sepultada em Durham, Middlesex, Conecticute, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lydia Bushnell родилась в 1661 г. в местности сеибрук, ню лондон, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика, её отцу по имени Lieutenant William Bushnell Sr of Horsham было 50 лет, а матери, которую звали Rebecca Chapman, 44. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Caleb Seward 14 июля 1686 г. в местности гуилфорд, ню хавен, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 1 дочь. Она умерла в местности дурам, хартфорд, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика и была похоронена в местности дурам, миддлесекс, Коннектикут, Соединенные штаты.

Se casó con Caleb Seward el 14 de julio de 1686, en Guilford, New Haven, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 1 hija.
